notes:
- Detect progressive video files (mp4, m4v, webm, mkv, mov, avi, flv, ogv, 3gp, wmv) -- previously only HLS/DASH manifests were sniffed
- Detect HLS/DASH/progressive responses by Content-Type header (catches streams served from URLs without a recognisable extension)
- Detect Microsoft Smooth Streaming (.ism/Manifest)
- Scan the DOM for <video> / <source> srcs so videos the user never clicks play on are still surfaced
- Tiny progressive responses (< 256 KB) are filtered out so thumbnails / preview clips don't pollute the badge
- Segment-only formats (.ts, .m4s) and blob:/data: URLs are skipped
